description_long: This kiosk features an open, oval-shaped structure with a prominent golden arch framing the main entrance. The exterior is defined by smooth, white and gold panels, with integrated illuminated signage displaying 'AL SAFWAH ROYALE ORCHID' above the entryway. The interior is furnished with modern seating, tables, and a central counter, creating a welcoming space for visitors. Large digital display screens are mounted on both ends, enhancing its commercial appeal. Decorative planters and sleek furniture add to the contemporary ambiance. The roof is partially open, supported by curved beams, allowing natural light to enter the space.
description: A modern, oval-shaped kiosk with a golden arch, illuminated signage, open sides, digital displays, and contemporary furnishings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the golden arch entrance, illuminated signage, central counter, and seating areas on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the digital display screen, planters, and the open structure with visible interior seating.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the golden arch, signage, and interior furnishings visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with another digital display, planters, and a clear view of the open, accessible interior.
attribute_signage_type: illuminated sign integrated above the entrance arch, digital display screens on both ends, text: 'AL SAFWAH ROYALE ORCHID'
attribute_door_configuration: single open archway at front and rear
attribute_roof_design: partially open, oval-shaped roof with curved beams and gold trim, no overhangs or skylights
attribute_architectural_style: contemporary with modern and Middle Eastern influences
